subcodes.first_line: O plaintive bird of the meadow of oneness, thy wondrous songs gladden all hearts and thy mournful melodies guide the path of souls [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مرغ زار مرغزار توحید الحان بدیعت مفرح قلوب و نغمات حزینت منهج نفوس فصاحت
subcodes.subjects: @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @poems and quotation from poetry
